issue_summary: Change int methods from deprecated to exception throwng
javadoc_before:
/** * Set the count back to 0. *

* WARNING This method will return an * incorrect count for files over 2GB - use * resetByteCount() instead. * * @return the count previous to resetting. * @deprecated use resetByteCount() - see issue IO-84 */
javadoc_after:
/** * Set the byte count back to 0. *

* NOTE: From v1.3 this method throws an ArithmeticException if the * count is greater than can be expressed by an int. * See {@link #resetByteCount()} for a method using a long. * * @return the count previous to resetting * @throws ArithmeticException if the byte count is too large */
